# setFieldOrder

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the setFieldOrder mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk set-field-order --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.fieldIds <UUID>
```
